name: Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and pat dry.
2. Place the chicken breast side up in an ungreased 13x9x2" baking pan.
3. Combine the seasonings; rub over and inside the chickens.
4. Cover tightly and bake at 400°F for 1 hour.
5. Uncover and bake for another 30 minutes, or until a meat thermometer reads 180°F.
6. Serve one chicken immediately. Cool the second chicken; debone and cube the meat, then refrigerate or freeze (may be frozen up to 3 months).
Yield: 4 to 6 servings per chicken.
Marian Platta of Sequim, WA says this is a snap to prepare and making extra for casseroles is a real time-saver.
